gate_outcome.description: The §7 decision-gate result. PENDING = halted awaiting the operator verdict; MODE_HALT = halted at §2 ambiguous-mode detection (no gate reached). Only APPROVED / REVISED_THEN_APPROVED runs emit an artefact.

plan_id.description: Null when no artefact was emitted (ABORTED / PENDING / MODE_HALT).

plan_path.description: docs/plans/PLAN-<slug>-<YYYYMMDD>/plan.md. Null when no artefact was emitted.

mode.description: Detected mode. Null only on MODE_HALT (ambiguous — the operator names it on resume).

scan_ref.description: Path to the repo-context-map@1 produced by the brownfield pre-interview scan. Null only in greenfield (PLAN-SAFE-004).

memory_rows.description: Chain hashes of the BRAIN rows appended via memory-append (kind artefact_write); must match frontmatter memory_rows (PLAN-BRAIN-001).
